name: Romaine, Red Onion, and Fennel Salad with Tart Lime Dress
recipeIngredient: 1½ cups fennel bulb, shredded (about 1 large bulb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the romaine lettuce thoroughly.
2. Shred the fennel bulb and red onion as finely as desired.
3. Toss all ingredients together in a large bowl.
4. Make the dressing by combining lime juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
5. Drizzle the dressing over the salad and toss gently to combine.
